blockMeta.name: Thanks so much for joining u…

runs.text: Thanks so much for joining us for “Email best practices for Higher Ed teams”.
We loved having you with us!

blockMeta.name: If there's one thing we hope…

runs.text: If there's one thing we hope you took away from the session, is that stress-free cycle prep doesn't start with a total overhaul. It starts with smart, manageable changes that make a big difference.

blockMeta.name: Small shifts that save you h…

runs.text: Small shifts that save you hours

blockMeta.name: These quick wins will help y…

runs.text: These quick wins will help you simplify your email process, improve consistency, and save time (without the added stress).
Set up your brand guidelines within your workspace so your fonts, colors, and logo are just a click away. With Beefree, this is as easy as copy and pasting a link.
Browse through your previous emails: Are there any content block that you reuse often? If so, save them as a saved row.
Set up dedicated workspaces for each department to make collaboration across decentralized teams easier and more organized.
Assign user roles and permissions to control who can edit, review, and publish content.

blockMeta.name: Cut down on time spent troub…

runs.text: Cut down on time spent troubleshooting by previewing how your emails will render on dark mode and various screen sizes directly within the Beefree.
